web.title: Diana high-speed target drone - Aircraft - Military Periscope
web.description: The Diana unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) is a high-speed target system designed to simulate threats for a range of current and future weapon systems.

web.title: Blue Horizon UAV — RPVs/Drones/Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles
web.description: The Blue Horizon medium-endurance tactical unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) is designed to provide reconnaissance and surveillance in day and night operations.
